title: selaginella pricei
intro: Selaginella pricei, also known as Price's spikemoss, is a species of evergreen plant in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its small, spiky leaves and ability to thrive in low-light conditions. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Some studies suggest that Selaginella pricei may have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving antioxidant defenses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Selaginella pricei is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with medications and the lack of standardization in its preparation.
